economic_notes: GBEs include forestry operations (Services Forestiers Atikamekw Aski), sawmill (Scierie Tackipotcikan), economic development (Nictamitakok), retail (Comptoir Atowkinatok), telecommunications (Services Télécommunications Wemotaci, Société de Télécommunications Atikamekw-Cri), propane (Wemogaz), Club Odanak, Pierre Naud/Mokotakan partnership, and several numbered companies as general partners. Hydro-Québec revenue entitlement (Entente Hydro-Québec Atikamekw Nehirowisiw 2015, Fiducie Mictikw Coria, Entente Hydro-Québec Wemotaci 2002) used as security for AFPN bond debt.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-compliance with SP 3280 (asset retirement obligations) - the Council did not identify or measure ARO liabilities as required. Financial statements are combined (not consolidated) and include: Fonds de fonctionnement, Fonds d'entreprise - Comité d'habitation, Fonds d'entreprise - Collectif de crédit, Fonds de développement économique et communautaire, and Fiducie Mictikw Coria. 18 GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Large deferred revenue balance of $39.3M in 2023 vs $7.3M in 2022 - significant increase. Tangible capital assets total includes both regular ($59,307,848) and housing fund ($3,212,287) = $62,520,135. Revenue and expense detail by program not available in provided text - only aggregate totals shown. ISC funding shown is accounts receivable balance only, not total funding received. Revenue lines breakdown not available in provided text excerpt. Revaluation loss of $803,167 on investments recorded separately under new SP 3450 standard adopted April 1, 2022. Prior year correction of $46,131 to accumulated surplus.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
